name: Auto Scroll
description: Smoothly auto-scroll long pages — articles, feeds, manga, web fiction. A floating remote control lets you start, pause, and adjust speed (1× to 10×). Pauses when you scroll manually, resumes when you let go, stops when the tab is backgrounded.

configItems.name: Default speed level (1-10)
configItems.description: 1 ≈ 30 px/s, 10 ≈ 300 px/s. The floating panel can override this live without changing this saved value.

configItems.name: Pause on user interaction
configItems.description: When on, manual scroll / arrow keys / spacebar briefly pause auto-scroll. Resumes after about 1.5 seconds of idle.
